response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior engineer with demonstrated leadership, mentoring, and experience in building large-scale, high-performance systems. His work with DLang on low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby is particularly relevant. However, he falls significantly short of the 8-year C++ minimum qualification, with his only professional C++ experience being a 7-month role nearly a decade ago. An interview would only be recommended if the hiring team is flexible on the C++ requirement and willing to consider his extensive DLang experience as a substitute.
strengths: Proven leadership and mentoring initiative through founding projects, running workshops, and holding Staff-level roles.
Experience with high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Broad technical background including DevOps, cloud infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS CDK), and multiple programming paradigms.
concerns: Vastly insufficient C++ experience, which is listed as a minimum qualification requiring 8 years.
Recent professional experience is heavily focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than core systems programming.
Cloud experience seems to be more from a user/application perspective (AWS CDK, Kubernetes for deployment) rather than building a core compute platform.
